message:
fix: validate multivariate_hypergeometric parameters match NumPy

NumPy requires sum(colors) < 10^9 for hypergeometric distributions.
Changed return type to Result and added validation for:
- sum(colors) >= HYPERGEOMETRIC_MAX (10^9)
- nsample > total

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
